---
title: Start Here
comments: false
toc: false
---

This page is for first-time readers who want practical regulatory statistics guidance quickly.

## If you work in clinical/regulatory teams (non-statistician)

1. [FDA Guidance Statistical Guidance on Reporting Results from Studies Evaluating Diagnostic Tests](/posts/FDA-Guidance-Statistical-Guidance-on-Reporting-Results-from-Studies-Evaluating-Diagnostic-Tests_Translated/)
2. [Adjustment of Baseline Covariates in Randomized Controlled Trial](/posts/Adjustment_of_Baseline_Covariates/)
3. [Connection between noncomparative adaptive design and estimand framework](/posts/Noncomparative_adaptive_design_estimand_framework/)

## If you prepare device submissions

1. [Use of Real-World Evidence to Support Regulatory Decision-Making for Medical Devices](/posts/RWE_medical_device_FDA/)
2. [식약처 의료기기 임상관련 통계업무](/posts/Medical-Device-Biostatistician-Work/)
3. [의료기기의 실사용증거 적용에 대한 가이드라인 후기](/posts/RWE_guidance_final/)

## If you are new to trial design decisions

1. [Introduction to advanced designs for clinical trial](/posts/Advanced-designs-for-clinical-trial-1st-week/)
2. [Pragmatic trial](/posts/Advanced-designs-for-clinical-trial-2nd-week/)
3. [Switching noninferiority and superiority trial](/posts/switching_noninferiority_superiority/)

## Recommended weekly reading routine

- Read one guidance interpretation post from [FDA Guidance Digest](/guidance-watch/).
- Read one method post from [Problem Index](/tags/).
- Share one post with your clinical, RA/QA, or medical affairs team and discuss implications for your protocol.
